title: SoftBank reportedly weighs $100 billion valuation for new AI and robotics spinout in potential U.S. IPO
summary_full: SoftBank Group is planning to create and list a standalone artificial intelligence and robotics company, coined "Roze" in the U.S.
summary_public: SoftBank Group is planning to create and list a standalone artificial intelligence and robotics company, coined "Roze" in the U.S.
